Patch Set 1:

James, these lbuild changes are the same as the ones in the previous update mod for LU-10427 that hasn't landed yet.  Has +reviews there.  They are necessary due to the fact that both sles12sp2 and sles12sp3 now have 4.4.103 kernels, which means in this specific case more complicated logic is needed to distinguish between them.

commit.subject: LU-10464 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.103-92.56]
commit.message:
LU-10464 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.103-92.56]

Update target and kernel_config files for new version

Test-Parameters: clientdistro=sles12sp2 testgroup=review-ldiskfs \
  mdsdistro=sles12sp2 ossdistro=sles12sp2 \
  mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs

Signed-off-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
Change-Id: I0eb5dc783bcbcd4ee8643431345daefb9cb89eb1
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/30748
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Minh Diep <minh.diep@intel.com>

Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
